title: agrostis hesperica
intro: Agrostis hesperica, also known as Western bent grass or Pacific bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Pacific coastal regions of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis hesperica include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Agrostis hesperica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
